# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    postgresql \
    postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    wget \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Configure Nginx (Web Server - port 80)
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default 2>/dev/null || true
RUN echo 'server { \n\
    listen 80; \n\
    server_name localhost; \n\
    root /var/www/html; \n\
    index index.html; \n\
    location / { \n\
        try_files $uri $uri/ =404; \n\
    } \n\
}' > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default

# Create web root and a default page
RUN mkdir -p /var/www/html
RUN echo '<html><body><h1>Dev Container Web Server</h1></body></html>' > /var/www/html/index.html

# Setup API Server (port 8080)
RUN mkdir -p /opt/api
WORKDIR /opt/api
RUN echo '{ "name": "api-server", "version": "1.0.0", "main": "server.js", "dependencies": { "express": "^4.18.0" } }' > package.json
RUN npm install
RUN echo 'const express = require("express"); \n\
const app = express(); \n\
app.use(express.json()); \n\
app.get("/", (req, res) => res.json({ status: "ok", service: "api" })); \n\
app.get("/health", (req, res) => res.json({ healthy: true })); \n\
app.listen(8080, "0.0.0.0", () => console.log("API server running on port 8080"));' > server.js

# Configure PostgreSQL (port 5432)
USER postgres
RUN /etc/init.d/postgresql start && \
    psql --command "ALTER USER postgres WITH PASSWORD 'devpassword';" && \
    createdb devdb && \
    /etc/init.d/postgresql stop

USER root

# Update PostgreSQL to listen on all interfaces
RUN PG_VERSION=$(ls /etc/postgresql/) && \
    echo "host all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5" >> /etc/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main/pg_hba.conf && \
    sed -i "s/#listen_addresses = 'localhost'/listen_addresses = '*'/" /etc/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main/postgresql.conf

# Configure Redis (port 6379) to listen on all interfaces
RUN sed -i 's/^bind 127.0.0.1/bind 0.0.0.0/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/^protected-mode yes/protected-mode no/' /etc/redis/redis.conf

# Setup Supervisor to manage all services
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor
RUN PG_VERSION=$(ls /etc/postgresql/) && \
    echo "[supervisord] \n\
nodaemon=true \n\
logfile=/var/log/supervisor/supervisord.log \n\
pidfile=/var/run/supervisord.pid \n\
\n\
[program:nginx] \n\
command=/usr/sbin/nginx -g 'daemon off;' \n\
autostart=true \n\
autorestart=true \n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx_stdout.log \n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/nginx_stderr.log \n\
\n\
[program:api] \n\
command=/usr/bin/node /opt/api/server.js \n\
autostart=true \n\
autorestart=true \n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api_stdout.log \n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/api_stderr.log \n\
\n\
[program:postgresql] \n\
command=/usr/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/bin/postgres -D /var/lib/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/${PG_VERSION}/main/postgresql.conf \n\
user=postgres \n\
autostart=true \n\
autorestart=true \n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres_stdout.log \n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/postgres_stderr.log \n\
\n\
[program:redis] \n\
command=/usr/bin/redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf \n\
autostart=true \n\
autorestart=true \n\
stdout_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis_stdout.log \n\
stderr_logfile=/var/log/supervisor/redis_stderr.log" > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

# Environment variables for service connection
ENV DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:devpassword@localhost:5432/devdb
ENV REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
ENV API_URL=http://localhost:8080
ENV WEB_URL=http://localhost:80

# Expose all service ports
EXPOSE 80
EXPOSE 8080
EXPOSE 5432
EXPOSE 6379

# Health check to verify all services are running
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://localhost:80/ && \
        curl -f http://localhost:8080/health && \
        pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres && \
        redis-cli -h localhost -p 6379 ping | grep -q PONG || exit 1

WORKDIR /opt

# Start all services via supervisor
CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
